action.reasoning: Observation: Training repeatedly failing with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'xgboost' (code in model.py/train.py/predict.py ready for XGB on Morgan FP r=3 n_bits=2048; best prior MAE=0.2188 from RF, MLP 0.231). Iter_7 curve shows smooth loss drop to ~0.22 plateau. Analysis: xgboost not preinstalled but installable (persists); XGB with MAE objective + early stopping should beat RF (~0.16-0.19 MAE expected) on this high-dim sparse tabular task. FP calc ~3-5min acceptable with ~1.8h/17 iters left. Decision: Install xgboost, incrementally edit model.py (add objective='reg:absoluteerror' for MAE optimization + n_estimators=1000), run train.py (full data, logs val_mae to metrics.jsonl, saves best.pkl), submit_eval for test score + timing.
